name: HelioMet Materials
mission: Aluminum alloys 3x stronger for aerospace and defense.
signature_edge: BYU-spun aluminum-alloy startup with SBIR Phase I in hand — the rare Utah hardware company already inside DoD funding circles.

name: NeuraDose
mission: Targeted drug delivery from Utah lab research to clinical trials.
signature_edge: U of U bioengineering spinout pre-clinical with active NIH funding — clinical-translation pipeline already underway.

name: LedgerLoop
mission: Scaling B2B SaaS billing for the Silicon Slopes ecosystem.
signature_edge: Bootstrapped to Series A in Lehi — built by Silicon Slopes operators serving Silicon Slopes customers.

name: Recursion Pharmaceuticals
mission: Industrialize drug discovery using AI-driven cellular phenotyping at scale.
signature_edge: Utah's flagship AI-bio company — went from U of U lab to NASDAQ. Hires hundreds of engineers and scientists in Salt Lake.

name: Owlet
mission: Smart infant-monitoring devices that turn pediatric data into parental peace of mind.
signature_edge: BYU Sandbox alum that took a hardware product to public-market scale and earned FDA Class II clearance — rare combo for Utah medtech.

name: Strider Technologies
mission: Open-source intelligence to identify nation-state threats inside global supply chains.
signature_edge: Lehi-built nation-state-threat intel platform — rare Utah cyber company already inside DoD and ITAR-cleared workstreams.

name: Vasion
mission: Print + workflow automation for enterprises moving off legacy systems.
signature_edge: Bootstrapped to growth-stage in Lehi (formerly PrinterLogic) — quiet operator alumni network worth tapping for first hires.

name: Pattern
mission: Operating partner for global brands selling through online marketplaces.
signature_edge: Lehi-built marketplace ops platform — among the largest privately-held Utah SaaS companies, deep operator pool.

name: Filevine
mission: Vertical SaaS platform for legal-case management and modern law-firm operations.
signature_edge: Salt Lake-built vertical SaaS that owns a category — proof Utah can produce focused B2B winners outside Lehi.
